raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Newsom's proposed budget includes $1.1 billion in immediate relief for small businesses devastated by the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The proposed budget includes a $2.4 billion 'Golden State Stimulus' plan that will grant a refund payment to recipients of the California Earned Income Tax Credit program.",
    "A proposed investment of $372 million is aimed at more quickly rolling out COVID-19 vaccines.",
    "The pandemic has exposed significant inequities in the health care system that lead to acute medical problems and ongoing health issues in vulnerable communities.",
    "$353 million is proposed for workforce development programs in the Central Valley region.",
    "$94.8 million is proposed for telehealth efforts to better connect with and serve patients.",
    "$400 million is proposed for school-based mental health services."
  ]
}
```
